name: Chocolate Chip Cream Cheese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and cream cheese until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg and vanilla, then stir in half of the cake mix until smooth.
3. Stir in the remaining cake mix.
4. Add the chocolate chips and ground nuts.
5. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
